appsync.functionconfiguration.appsyncrun: Describes a runtime used by an AWS AppSync resolver or AWS AppSync function. Specifies the name and version of the runtime to use. Note that if a runtime is specified, code must also be specified.

appsync.functionconfiguration.appsyncrun.Description: The `name` of the runtime to use. Currently, the only allowed value is `APPSYNC_JS`.
The `version` of the runtime to use. Currently, the only allowed version is `1.0.0`.
